creator: tech-lists@zyxst.net
text:
(In reply to Gerard Seibert from comment #165)

Just for curiosity, I tried commenting out ehci (i.e. disabling usb2) and uncommented xhci (so enabling usb3) and then rebuilding kernel, and it *worked* with no errors on usb3.

The usb3-connected disk is Seagate ST4000LM016 4TB SATA. Transferred large files across, no errors, tested with sha512
